scope.notes: Global scope = filter 16090 (EPCE-3897). All quarterly JQL and sizing exclude status Rejected. Lane JQL generated exclusively (L3→L2→L1→unassigned). Jira hygiene filter smart-quarterly-unassigned = board-inverse within global.

quarterGoal.notes: Goal = aggregated Story/Spike/Bug SP under initiative (same as Smartificer). Run scripts/quarterly/fetch_quarter_goal.py --write; loads quarter-goal.json at report time. plannedStoryPointsByScope sums SP in global quarter slices.

educationCloud.label: Lane 1 — Education Cloud (squad Scrum)
educationCloud.sprintScopeNotes: Sprint = commitment; fixVersion = delivery promise within quarter.
educationCloud.releaseScopeFilterPattern: filter = smart-project-epce-stories AND "Delivery Squad[Select List (multiple choices)]" = "{squad}" AND fixVersion ~ "{quarterFixVersionPattern}"
excludeFromSprintHealth: AIS anchor items (Drop from Sprint Health where appropriate)

integration.label: Lane 2 — Integration programme (EPCE Kanban)
integration.clusterDoneRule: All tight-coupled members (same quarter fixVersion) reach Deploy+

unassigned.label: Unassigned (in quarter scope, not on a lane board)
unassigned.notes: Exclusive bucket after L3/L2/L1 priority. Jira filter smart-quarterly-unassigned uses board-inverse for hygiene.

standup.engineBoardNote: PDE board 35 — release-week use only, not daily standup

githubPages.notes: Static snapshot for GitHub Pages. Enable Settings → Pages → branch develop → folder /docs. Use a private repo for staff-only access.

releasePlan.notes: Sprints from import_release_plan.py (EPC Release Planning.xlsx). Engine releases from PDE Engine fixVersion + Carriage Type; projected biweekly from last in-cycle.

deliveryMilestones.notes: Hub children under initiative Milestone link, narrowed by saved filter 15858 (smart-milestone-report). Fetch JQL: project = PDE AND parent = {hub} AND filter = smart-milestone-report. Chart window dates are parsed from that filter JQL when present.

milestoneScopeChart.notes: Timeline report: fetch_milestone_timeline.py then milestone_scope_report.py. Composition data (milestone-scope-chart.json) reserved for a later phase.

burnTracking.notes: goalTargetDate = when the linear goal line reaches 100% SP. Chart x-axis still runs to quarter.endDate. idealCurve linear_to_quarter_end ignores goalTargetDate.

notes: Scaffolding for EPCE-6745 three-lane model. Scope parent EPCE-3897; global filter 16090; headline burn on global scope.
